description: Fact-check pass (research pipeline step 4): for each synthesis paragraph, verify against the abstract of the source it cites whether the claim is actually supported. Produces a per-paragraph verdict report (supported / unsupported / uncertain) as the run output — a pre-pass for the domain expert before publication, not a public data write. Set gfc-check.model_name to a stronger model for the judgement.

nodes.label: Start
nodes.description: Entry. Receives disease_slug; requires an existing synthesis.

nodes.label: Load claims + cited sources
nodes.description: Load the synthesis paragraphs (with provenance) + abstracts of the cited shelf documents.

nodes.label: Fact-check claims vs sources
nodes.description: Per-paragraph verdict: does the cited source's abstract actually support the claim? Set model_name to a stronger model for this judgement.
